title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster. The video argues Anthropic lacks vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to other frontier AI labs, and frames the AI competitive advantage as shifting toward hardware control and datacenter resources rather than model benchmarks.
